ghl_opportunity_match_consistency.name: ghl_opportunity_match_consistency
ghl_opportunity_match_consistency.value: ("agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."status" = 'matched' AND "agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."leadId" IS NOT NULL AND "agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."method" IS NOT NULL AND "agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."candidateCount" = 1) OR ("agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."status" <> 'matched' AND "agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."leadId" IS NULL AND "agency_os_ghl_opportunity_match"."method" IS NULL)
